name: Thai Burgers with Mint Cucumber Relish
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Thai fish sauce or soy sauce
1 tbsp Thai fish sauce or soy sauce
1 tbsp Sugar (use much less, use none actually)
recipeInstructions:
Combine burger ingredients and shape into 4-6 burgers. Drain chopped cucumber; mix in remaining relish ingredients; reserve.
Just before serving, heat grill and brush with oil. Cook burgers for 4 minutes per side, turning once.
Makes 4-6 servings.
(If lemon grass is very dry, soak 20 minutes before using. If you cannot find lemon grass, use 1 tsp grated lemon peel.)
